flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at West Virginia Junior College-Morgantown rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.6k → $9.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at West Virginia Junior College-Morgantown fell 14% between 2019 and 2022 (74.4% → 64.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at West Virginia Junior College-Morgantown rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (558 → 673).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Virginia Junior College-Morgantown rose 20% between 2023 and 2024 (59.0% → 71.1%).
